---
title: "Collapse-callouts Example"
filters:
  - collapse-callouts

teaching:
  collapse-tips: true
---

## Basic 

This filter lets one configure whether callouts are collapsed by default at the project level rather than 
for each callout. 

The extension looks for these metadata entries 

```sh
teaching:
  collapse-notes: true
  collapse-warnings: true
  collapse-importants: true
  collapse-tips: true
  collapse-cautions: true
```

In which case all callouts will be collapsed by default. This document is rendered with `collapse-tips: true`
so only tips will collapse by default. 

### Collapsed by default tip

````
::: {.callout-tip}
This is collapsed by default because of `collapse-tips: true` in the document metadata.
::: 
````

::: {.callout-tip}
This is collapsed by default because of `collapse-tips: true` in the document metadata.
::: 

### Uncollapsed by default note

````
::: {.callout-note}
This is not collapsed
::: 
````

::: {.callout-note}
This is not collapsed
::: 

### Uncollapsed by overwrite tip

````
::: {.callout-tip collapse="false"}
This is not collapsed because of an overwrite. 
::: 
````

::: {.callout-tip collapse="false"}
This is not collapsed because of an overwrite. 
:::
